briefings.title: Monday Briefing - March 23
briefings.content:
## 🌅 Monday Briefing — March 23, 2026

**Let's get it. Big week ahead.**

---

### 🔥 Top Priority Actions Today

1. **🎯 Call NSCC Procurement — 902.454.9400**
   Follow up on the spirit wear outreach email Ben sent Sunday night. Early Monday = best time to catch procurement staff.

2. **📧 Send AUS Outreach Email**
   Email is drafted and ready. Ben sends from Launchpadbyapolloinc@gmail.com to Alex Carson at acarson@atlanticuniversitysport.com. 11 universities. This is a big one.

3. **🎬 Crushers Content Week — Day 1**
   This is the week. Fire up the Crushers merch push. Day 1 post planned. Check planning/crushers-content-week.md for the full shot list and script.

---

### 📋 Everything On The Board

- **📦 Shipments inbound** — UPS (1Z01Y3X76733523846) + DHL (1802810671) both en route to Pictou. Check for delivery updates today.
- **🧾 Accountant — URGENT** — HST/GST exposure is real. Apollo crossed the $30K threshold mid-2025. Every week without an accountant is risk. Make finding one a priority this week.
- **🎩 Summer Hat Outreach** — 20 emails ready to go, just need Boo + Ben's green light before they send.
- **📱 IG Profile** — Bio link, shop CTA, highlights still need cleaning up. Low-lift, high-impact.
- **🏭 PA Hoodie Specs** — Still waiting on Boo to pull the size chart, colors, and photos from the China factory.
- **☁️ Google Drive Uploads** — OAuth2 still needs to be set up so Ace can push files directly. Teed up for next session.
- **💳 Shopify Billing** — Still on Ben's personal card. Should move to company card.

---

### 💰 Financial Snapshot
- **2025 Real Revenue:** ~$87K (bank verified)
- **2026 Annualized Pace:** ~$295K (based on Q1 data)
- **2026 Goal:** $250–350K (on track if summer drops land)
- **Current Bank Balance:** ~$11K (March 21)
- **Owner draws:** $1K/mo each since Jan 2026

---

### 📊 Pipeline
- 23 leads tracked (16 custom/wholesale + 7 retail stores)
- 20 summer hat outreach emails ready to fire
- Active tender targets: NSCC, AUS, Jubilee, Stanfest, NS Tattoo, Great Outdoors Comedy

---

*Briefing auto-generated by Ace at 6:00 AM Atlantic — Dashboard: solveworks.io/apollo/*
